untranslatable_reason: Signal requires Elliott Wave identification (Wave 1, 3, 4, 5 detection), wave ratio calculations (Wave 1/Wave 5, Wave 5/Wave 3), and dynamic target price calculation based on Wave 4 low + THRESHOLD%. These are pattern recognition and multi-bar structural analysis tasks that cannot be expressed using point-in-time technical indicators. The [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] parameter is undefined and critical to the rule. Wave retracement levels and Fibonacci ratio validation require historical wave labeling logic not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally pattern-based requiring manual Elliott Wave labeling and structural analysis. The allowed indicator set contains only price action, moving averages, and oscillators—not wave detection or multi-wave ratio validation. A proxy entry using price above SMA_20 was provided as fallback, but this does NOT capture the intended Elliott Wave 5 logic with 0.618 ratios. The exit condition marked AUTHOR_SILENT was interpreted as a simple trend reversal below SMA_20. Manual chart review or dedicated Elliott Wave software is required to properly implement this signal.
